const nativeCancelAnimationFrame = window.cancelAnimationFrame
? window.cancelAnimationFrame.bind(window)
: window.clearTimeout.bind(window);
const nativeSetInterval = window.setInterval.bind(window);
let paused = false;
let nextFrameId = 1;
const frameRecords = new Map();
const pausedFrameCallbacks = new Map();
const style = document.createElement('style');
style.id = 'aura-preview-performance-style';
style.textContent = [
'html[data-aura-preview-paused="true"] *,',
'html[data-aura-preview-paused="true"] *::before,',

'  transition-duration: 0s !important;',
'  scroll-behavior: auto !important;',
'}'

document.head.appendChild(style);
window.requestAnimationFrame = function(callback) {
const frameId = nextFrameId++;
if (paused) {
pausedFrameCallbacks.set(frameId, callback);
frameRecords.set(frameId, { paused: true });
return frameId;
}
const nativeFrameId = nativeRequestAnimationFrame(function(timestamp) {
frameRecords.delete(frameId);
callback(timestamp);
});
frameRecords.set(frameId, { nativeFrameId: nativeFrameId });
return frameId;
};
window.cancelAnimationFrame = function(frameId) {
const record = frameRecords.get(frameId);
pausedFrameCallbacks.delete(frameId);
if (record && typeof record.nativeFrameId !== 'undefined') {
nativeCancelAnimationFrame(record.nativeFrameId);
}
frameRecords.delete(frameId);
};
window.setInterval = function(callback, delay) {
const args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments, 2);
return nativeSetInterval(function() {
if (paused) return;
callback.apply(this, args);
}, delay);
};
const flushPausedFrames = function() {
const callbacks = Array.from(pausedFrameCallbacks.entries());
pausedFrameCallbacks.clear();
callbacks.forEach(function(entry) {
const frameId = entry[0];
const callback = entry[1];
const nativeFrameId = nativeRequestAnimationFrame(function(timestamp) {
frameRecords.delete(frameId);
callback(timestamp);
});
frameRecords.set(frameId, { nativeFrameId: nativeFrameId });
});
};
const setPaused = function(nextPaused) {
const shouldPause = Boolean(nextPaused);
if (paused === shouldPause) return;

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Overprint, a chromatic typeface by Recto</title>
<meta name="description" content="Overprint. A chromatic variable typeface that ships in four plates. It prints out of register, then snaps into line. By Recto Type Foundry.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bricolage+Grotesque:opsz,wght@12..96,200..800&family=Hanken+Grotesk:wght@300..800&family=Martian+Mono:wght@300..600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
--paper: #e6e8e2;
--paper-2: #dde0d8;
--ink: #14141c;
--night: #101019;
--cyan: #1668b0;
--mag: #d6356b;
--yel: #e8b22b;
--hair: rgba(20, 20, 28, .14);
--hair-2: rgba(20, 20, 28, .3);
--hair-light: rgba(230, 232, 226, .16);
--disp: 'Bricolage Grotesque', 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
--body: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
--mono: 'Martian Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace;
--ease: cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1);
--pad: clamp(18px, 3.4vw, 52px);
}
* {
margin: 0;
padding: 0;
box-sizing: border-box
}
html {
scroll-behavior: auto
}
html,
body {
overflow-x: clip
}
body {
background: var(--paper);
color: var(--ink);
font-family: var(--body);
font-weight: 400;
-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}
::selection {
background: var(--mag);
color: var(--paper)
}
img {
display: block;
max-width: 100%
}
a {
color: inherit;
text-decoration: none
}
button {
font: inherit;
background: none;
border: 0;
cursor: pointer;
color: inherit
}
.mono {
font-family: var(--mono);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: .14em;
text-transform: uppercase;
font-weight: 400
}
h2.sec-title {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 800;
font-size: clamp(26px, 4vw, 58px);
letter-spacing: -.02em;
line-height: .96
}
.eyebrow {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
color: var(--mag);
margin-bottom: 22px
}
.eyebrow .num {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 800;
color: var(--ink)
}
.lede {
max-width: 52ch;
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .82;
line-height: 1.55;
font-size: clamp(15px, 1.4vw, 18px)
}
/* halftone texture */
body::after {
content: "";
position: fixed;
inset: 0;
z-index: 91;
pointer-events: none;
opacity: .5;
background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(20, 20, 28, .10) 0.7px, transparent 0.8px);
background-size: 5px 5px;
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.reg-bar {
position: fixed;
top: 0;
left: 0;
height: 2px;
width: 0%;
z-index: 95;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--cyan), var(--mag), var(--yel))
}
/* cursor */
.cursor {
position: fixed;
z-index: 99;
top: 0;
left: 0;
width: 30px;
height: 30px;
pointer-events: none;
transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
transition: width .3s var(--ease), height .3s var(--ease), opacity .25s
}
.cursor svg {
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
display: block;
color: var(--ink)
}
.cursor.is-link {
width: 54px;
height: 54px;
color: var(--mag)
}
@media(pointer:coarse) {
.cursor {
display: none
}
}
/* loader */
.veil {
position: fixed;
inset: 0;
z-index: 200;
background: var(--night);
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 20px
}
.veil .bars {
display: flex;
gap: 7px
}
.veil .bars i {
display: block;
width: 34px;
height: 6px;
transform: scaleX(.2);
transform-origin: left;
animation: load 1.1s var(--ease) infinite alternate
}
.veil .bars i:nth-child(1) {
background: var(--cyan)
}
.veil .bars i:nth-child(2) {
background: var(--mag);
animation-delay: .12s
}
.veil .bars i:nth-child(3) {
background: var(--yel);
animation-delay: .24s
}
@keyframes load {
to {
transform: scaleX(1)
}
}
.veil .mono {
color: rgba(230, 232, 226, .5)
}
/* nav */
nav {
position: fixed;
top: 0;
left: 0;
right: 0;
z-index: 70;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: space-between;
padding: 20px var(--pad)
}
nav .brand {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 800;
font-size: 17px;
letter-spacing: .02em
}
nav .brand .reg {
width: 16px;
height: 16px;
color: var(--mag)
}
.nav-links {
display: flex;
gap: 26px;
align-items: center
}
.nav-links a {
position: relative;
font-family: var(--mono);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: .14em;
text-transform: uppercase
}
.nav-links a::after {
content: "";
position: absolute;
left: 0;
bottom: -6px;
height: 1px;
width: 0;
background: var(--mag);
transition: width .35s var(--ease)
}
.nav-links a:hover::after {
width: 100%
}
.nav-buy {
border: 1px solid var(--ink);
border-radius: 999px;
padding: 8px 18px;
font-family: var(--mono);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: .12em;
text-transform: uppercase;
transition: background .3s var(--ease), color .3s var(--ease)
}
.nav-buy:hover {
background: var(--ink);
color: var(--paper)
}
@media(max-width:820px) {
.nav-links a:not(.nav-buy) {
display: none
}
}
/* chromatic primitive */
.chroma {
display: grid;
line-height: .9
}
.chroma>span {
grid-area: 1/1;
display: block;
font-family: var(--disp);
will-change: transform
}
.chroma .pc {
color: var(--cyan);
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.chroma .pm {
color: var(--mag);
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.chroma .py {
color: var(--yel);
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.chroma .pk {
color: var(--ink)
}
/* hero */
.hero {
min-height: 100vh;
position: relative;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
justify-content: center;
padding: 140px var(--pad) 70px
}
.hero-kicker {
margin-bottom: 30px;
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .7
}
.hero-word {
font-size: clamp(56px, 16vw, 260px);
font-weight: 800;
letter-spacing: -.02em
}
.hero-word>span {
font-variation-settings: 'wght' 800, 'opsz' 96
}
.hero-row {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 40px;
align-items: flex-end;
justify-content: space-between;
margin-top: 42px
}
.hero-sub {
max-width: 46ch;
font-size: clamp(15px, 1.5vw, 19px);
line-height: 1.5
}
.hero-sub b {
font-weight: 700
}
.hero-meta {
display: flex;
gap: 26px;
flex-wrap: wrap
}
.hero-meta div {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 4px
}
.hero-meta .k {
color: var(--mag)
}
.hero-meta .v {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 700;
font-size: 15px
}
.hero-data {
display: flex;
gap: 22px;
margin-top: 34px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
border-top: 1px solid var(--hair);
padding-top: 18px
}
.hero-data span {
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .55
}
.hero-data b {
color: var(--mag)
}
.hero-cue {
position: absolute;
bottom: 26px;
left: 50%;
transform: translateX(-50%);
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .6
}
.hero-cue .dot {
width: 6px;
height: 6px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: var(--mag);
animation: pulse 1.6s var(--ease) infinite
}
@keyframes pulse {
0%,
100% {
transform: scale(1);
opacity: 1
}
50% {
transform: scale(2);
opacity: .3
}
}
.reg-mark {
position: absolute;
width: 42px;
height: 42px;
color: var(--hair);
pointer-events: none
}
.reg-mark.tr {
top: 96px;
right: var(--pad)
}
.reg-mark.bl {
bottom: 96px;
left: var(--pad)
}
/* marquee */
.marquee {
border-top: 1px solid var(--hair);
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hair);
overflow: hidden;
padding: 16px 0
}
.marquee .track {
display: flex;
white-space: nowrap;
width: max-content;
will-change: transform
}
.marquee .item {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 800;
font-size: clamp(28px, 4.6vw, 64px);
letter-spacing: -.01em;
padding: 0 28px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 28px
}
.marquee .item .sep {
width: 14px;
height: 14px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: var(--cyan)
}
.marquee .item:nth-child(2n) .sep {
background: var(--mag)
}
.marquee .item:nth-child(3n) .sep {
background: var(--yel)
}
/* optical size scrubber */
.opsz {
position: relative
}
.opsz-pin {
height: 100vh;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
overflow: hidden;
padding: 0 var(--pad)
}
.opsz-word {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 600;
line-height: .85;
text-align: center;
font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 12, 'wght' 600;
color: var(--ink)
}
.opsz-cap {
position: absolute;
top: 13%;
left: 50%;
transform: translateX(-50%);
text-align: center;
width: min(640px, 86vw)
}
.opsz-read {
position: absolute;
bottom: 13%;
left: 50%;
transform: translateX(-50%);
display: flex;
gap: 22px;
color: var(--ink)
}
.opsz-read b {
color: var(--mag)
}
.opsz-ghost {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 800;
font-size: 48vw;
color: var(--hair);
pointer-events: none;
z-index: -1;
letter-spacing: -.04em
}
/* press run */
.press {
position: relative
}
.press-stage {
height: 100vh;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
overflow: hidden
}
.press-eyebrow {
position: absolute;
top: 13%;
left: 50%;
transform: translateX(-50%);
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .65;
text-align: center
}
.press-word {
font-size: clamp(58px, 17vw, 250px);
font-weight: 800;
letter-spacing: -.02em
}
.press-word>span {
font-variation-settings: 'wght' 800
}
.press-hud {
position: absolute;
top: 50%;
right: var(--pad);
transform: translateY(-50%);
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 14px;
text-align: right;
opacity: 0
}
.press-hud .row {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: flex-end;
gap: 10px;
color: var(--ink)
}
.press-hud .sw {
width: 11px;
height: 11px;
border-radius: 50%
}
.press-lock {
position: absolute;
bottom: 14%;
left: 50%;
transform: translate(-50%, 12px);
opacity: 0;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
color: var(--mag)
}
.press-lock .dot {
width: 7px;
height: 7px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: var(--mag)
}
.press-frame {
position: absolute;
inset: 8% 6%;
border: 1px solid var(--hair);
opacity: 0
}
.press-frame::before,
.press-frame::after {
content: "";
position: absolute;
width: 14px;
height: 14px;
border: 1px solid var(--mag)
}
.press-frame::before {
top: -7px;
left: -7px;
border-radius: 50%
}
.press-frame::after {
bottom: -7px;
right: -7px;
border-radius: 50%
}
@media(max-width:760px) {
.press-hud {
display: none
}
}
/* PLATE SEPARATION (rebuilt) */
.sep-sec {
padding: clamp(80px, 13vh, 170px) var(--pad);
border-top: 1px solid var(--hair)
}
.sep-top {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1.1fr .9fr;
gap: 40px;
align-items: end;
margin-bottom: 60px
}
.sep-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 1fr;
gap: 40px;
align-items: center
}
.sep-stage-wrap {
position: relative
}
.sep-stage {
position: relative;
height: min(56vh, 520px);
perspective: 1400px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
overflow: visible
}
.sep-word {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 800;
font-size: clamp(70px, 12vw, 180px);
letter-spacing: -.03em;
transform-style: preserve-3d;
position: relative;
line-height: .9
}
.sep-word .pl {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
will-change: transform, filter;
transition: filter .2s linear
}
.sep-word .pl.pk {
position: relative
}
.sep-word .pc {
color: var(--cyan);
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.sep-word .pm {
color: var(--mag);
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.sep-word .py {
color: var(--yel);
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.sep-word .pk {
color: var(--ink)
}
.sep-ui {
margin-top: 30px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 18px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
justify-content: center
}
.sep-ui .hint {
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .55
}
.sep-range {
-webkit-appearance: none;
appearance: none;
width: min(360px, 70vw);
height: 1px;
background: var(--ink);
opacity: .45;
cursor: pointer
}
.sep-range::-webkit-slider-thumb {
-webkit-appearance: none;
width: 20px;
height: 20px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: var(--mag);
border: 2px solid var(--paper)
}
.sep-range::-moz-range-thumb {
width: 20px;
height: 20px;
border: 2px solid var(--paper);
border-radius: 50%;
background: var(--mag)
}
/* data panel */
.sep-data {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 0
}
.sep-row {
border-top: 1px solid var(--hair);
padding: 18px 0;
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
gap: 16px;
align-items: center
}
.sep-row:last-child {
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hair)
}
.sep-row .dot {
width: 14px;
height: 14px;
border-radius: 50%
}
.sep-row .name {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 800;
font-size: 18px
}
.sep-row .ang {
font-family: var(--mono);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: .1em;
opacity: .6;
display: block;
margin-top: 2px
}
.sep-row .bar {
height: 6px;
background: var(--hair);
position: relative;
border-radius: 2px;
overflow: hidden
}
.sep-row .bar i {
position: absolute;
left: 0;
top: 0;
bottom: 0;
width: 0;
transition: width 1.1s var(--ease)
}
.sep-row.in .bar i {
width: var(--cov)
}
.sep-row .pct {
font-family: var(--mono);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: .08em;
min-width: 42px;
text-align: right
}
.rosette {
margin-top: 34px;
border: 1px solid var(--hair);
padding: 18px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 18px
}
.rosette .swatch {
width: 78px;
height: 78px;
flex: none;
border-radius: 4px;
background-color: var(--paper);
background-image:
radial-gradient(var(--cyan) 22%, transparent 24%),
radial-gradient(var(--mag) 22%, transparent 24%),
radial-gradient(var(--yel) 22%, transparent 24%);
background-size: 12px 12px, 12px 12px, 12px 12px;
background-position: 0 0, 4px 4px, 8px 2px;
mix-blend-mode: multiply
}
.rosette .txt small {
display: block;
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .7;
line-height: 1.5;
margin-top: 6px;
font-size: 13px;
text-transform: none;
letter-spacing: 0;
font-family: var(--body)
}
@media(max-width:900px) {
.sep-top,
.sep-grid {
grid-template-columns: 1fr
}
}
/* opentype features */
.ot {
padding: clamp(80px, 13vh, 170px) var(--pad);
border-top: 1px solid var(--hair);
background: var(--paper)
}
.ot-sample {
font-family: var(--disp);
font-weight: 700;
font-size: clamp(30px, 5.4vw, 72px);
line-height: 1.05;
letter-spacing: -.01em;
margin: 36px 0 44px;
position: relative
}
.ot-sample.flash {
animation: otflash .5s var(--ease)
}
@keyframes otflash {
0% {
text-shadow: -6px 0 var(--cyan), 6px 0 var(--mag), 0 5px var(--yel)
}
100% {
text-shadow: none
}
}
.ot-chips {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 12px
}
.ot-chip {
border: 1px solid var(--hair-2);
border-radius: 999px;
padding: 10px 18px;
font-family: var(--mono);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: .1em;
text-transform: uppercase;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 9px;
transition: background .25s, color .25s, border-color .25s
}
.ot-chip .led {
width: 8px;
height: 8px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: var(--hair-2);
transition: background .25s
}
.ot-chip.on {
background: var(--ink);
color: var(--paper);
border-color: var(--ink)
}
.ot-chip.on .led {
background: var(--yel)
}
.ot-read {
margin-top: 26px;
color: var(--ink);
opacity: .6
}
/* specimen tester */
.spec {
padding: clamp(80px, 13vh, 170px) var(--pad);
border-top: 1px solid var(--hair)
}
.spec-head {
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
align-items: flex-end;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 18px;
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hair);
padding-bottom: 20px
}
.spec-stage {
min-height: 34vh;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
padding: 50px 0;
overflow: hidden
}
.spec-word {
font-size: clamp(48px, 12vw, 170px);
font-weight: 800;
outline: none;
text-align: center;
--spread: 16px;
--ink: .92;
--w: 740
}
.spec-word>span {
font-variation-settings: 'wght' var(--w);
transition: transform .12s linear
}
.spec-word .pc {
opacity: var(--ink);
transform: translate(calc(var(--spread)*-1), calc(var(--spread)*-.55))
}
.spec-word .pm {
opacity: var(--ink);
transform: translate(var(--spread), calc(var(--spread)*-.35))
}
.spec-word .py {
opacity: var(--ink);
transform: translate(calc(var(--spread)*.15), var(--spread))
}

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lenis@1.1.14/dist/lenis.min.js"></script>
    <script>
          (function(){
        var reduce = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
        var hasGSAP = typeof gsap !== 'undefined';
        var fine = window.matchMedia('(pointer:fine)').matches;

        /* loader */
        window.addEventListener('load', function(){
          var veil = document.getElementById('veil'); if(!veil) return;
          setTimeout(function(){
            veil.style.transition='opacity .6s ease, transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)';
            veil.style.opacity='0'; veil.style.transform='translateY(-100%)';
            setTimeout(function(){ veil.style.display='none'; }, 750);
          }, reduce ? 0 : 700);
        });

        /* Lenis */
        var lenis=null;
        if(typeof Lenis!=='undefined' && !reduce){
          lenis=new Lenis({duration:1.1,smoothWheel:true});
          (function raf(t){ lenis.raf(t); requestAnimationFrame(raf); })();
        }

        /* progress bar */
        var regBar=document.getElementById('regBar');
        function updateBar(){
          var h=document.documentElement, max=h.scrollHeight-h.clientHeight;
          var p=max>0?(h.scrollTop||window.scrollY)/max:0;
          if(regBar) regBar.style.width=(p*100).toFixed(2)+'%';
        }
        window.addEventListener('scroll',updateBar,{passive:true});
        if(lenis) lenis.on('scroll',updateBar); updateBar();

        /* cursor */
        var cursor=document.getElementById('cursor');
        if(cursor && fine){
          var cx=0,cy=0,tx=0,ty=0;
          document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){tx=e.clientX;ty=e.clientY;});
          (function loop(){ cx+=(tx-cx)*.22; cy+=(ty-cy)*.22;
            cursor.style.transform='translate('+cx+'px,'+cy+'px) translate(-50%,-50%)';
            requestAnimationFrame(loop); })();
          document.querySelectorAll('[data-link],a,button,[contenteditable],input').forEach(function(el){
            el.addEventListener('mouseenter',function(){cursor.classList.add('is-link');});
            el.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){cursor.classList.remove('is-link');});
          });
        }

        /* hero parallax + data readout */
        var heroWord=document.getElementById('heroWord');
        var hxEl=document.getElementById('hx'), hyEl=document.getElementById('hy'), hstat=document.getElementById('hstat');
        if(heroWord && !reduce){
          var plates=heroWord.children, mults=[[-1,-0.6],[1,-0.4],[0.2,1]];
          var hx=0,hy=0,thx=0,thy=0;
          window.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){
            thx=(e.clientX/window.innerWidth-0.5); thy=(e.clientY/window.innerHeight-0.5);
          });
          (function h(){ hx+=(thx-hx)*.08; hy+=(thy-hy)*.08;
            for(var i=0;i<plates.length;i++){ var m=mults[i]||[0,0];
              plates[i].style.transform='translate('+(hx*46*m[0]).toFixed(1)+'px,'+(hy*30*m[1]).toFixed(1)+'px)'; }
            if(hxEl){ var ox=Math.abs(hx*46*0.06).toFixed(2), oy=Math.abs(hy*30*0.06).toFixed(2);
              hxEl.textContent=ox; hyEl.textContent=oy;
              if(hstat) hstat.textContent=(Math.abs(hx)+Math.abs(hy)>0.06)?'out of register':'in register'; }
            requestAnimationFrame(h); })();
        }

        /* marquee */
        var track=document.getElementById('marqueeTrack');
        if(track){
          var words=['OVERPRINT','RECTO','FOUR PLATES','IN REGISTER','C M Y K'], html='';
          for(var r=0;r<2;r++) for(var w=0;w<words.length;w++) html+='<span class="item">'+words[w]+'<span class="sep"></span></span>';
          track.innerHTML=html;
          if(!reduce){ var pos=0,half=track.scrollWidth/2;
            (function m(){ pos-=0.5; if(half&&pos<=-half) pos+=half; track.style.transform='translateX('+pos+'px)'; requestAnimationFrame(m); })();
          }
        }

        /* specimen tester */
        var specWord=document.getElementById('specWord');
        var cSpread=document.getElementById('cSpread'), cInk=document.getElementById('cInk'), cWght=document.getElementById('cWght');
        function syncSpec(){
          if(!specWord) return;
          var s=+cSpread.value, ink=+cInk.value, wt=+cWght.value;
          specWord.style.setProperty('--spread',s+'px');
          specWord.style.setProperty('--ink',(ink/100).toFixed(2));
          specWord.style.setProperty('--w',wt);
          document.getElementById('vSpread').textContent=s;
          document.getElementById('vInk').textContent=ink;
          document.getElementById('vWght').textContent=wt;
          document.getElementById('specRead').textContent='spread '+s+' · ink '+ink+' · wght '+wt;
        }
        [cSpread,cInk,cWght].forEach(function(c){ if(c) c.addEventListener('input',syncSpec); });
        syncSpec();
        if(specWord) specWord.addEventListener('input',function(){
          var t=specWord.children[0].textContent;
          for(var i=1;i<specWord.children.length;i++) specWord.children[i].textContent=t;
        });
        var presets=document.getElementById('presets');
        if(presets) presets.addEventListener('click',function(e){
          var b=e.target.closest('.preset'); if(!b) return;
          animateSlider(cSpread,+b.dataset.s); animateSlider(cInk,+b.dataset.i); animateSlider(cWght,+b.dataset.w);
        });
        function animateSlider(el,to){
          if(!el) return; var from=+el.value, t0=performance.now(), dur=420;
          (function step(now){ var p=Math.min(1,(now-t0)/dur); var e=1-Math.pow(1-p,3);
            el.value=Math.round(from+(to-from)*e); syncSpec();
            if(p<1) requestAnimationFrame(step); })(t0);
        }

        /* plate separation */
        var sepWord=document.getElementById('sepWord'), sepRange=document.getElementById('sepRange');
        function applySep(){
          if(!sepWord) return; var v=(+sepRange.value)/100;
          var pls=sepWord.querySelectorAll('.pl');
          pls.forEach(function(p){
            var i=+p.dataset.i, c=(i-1.5);
            var dx=c*v*70, dy=c*v*116, rot=c*v*5, z=i*v*70;
            p.style.transform='translate3d('+dx.toFixed(1)+'px,'+dy.toFixed(1)+'px,'+z.toFixed(1)+'px) rotate('+rot.toFixed(2)+'deg)';
            p.style.filter = v>0.05 ? 'drop-shadow(0 '+(v*16).toFixed(0)+'px '+(v*20).toFixed(0)+'px rgba(20,20,28,'+(v*0.18).toFixed(2)+'))' : 'none';
          });
        }
        if(sepRange){ sepRange.addEventListener('input',applySep); applySep(); }

        /* opentype features */
        var otSample=document.getElementById('otSample'), otChips=document.getElementById('otChips'), otRead=document.getElementById('otRead');
        var otState={liga:false,tnum:false,onum:false,frac:false,zero:false,smcp:false};
        function applyOT(){
          if(!otSample) return;
          var lig = otState.liga ? 'common-ligatures discretionary-ligatures' : 'no-common-ligatures';
          var num=[]; if(otState.tnum) num.push('tabular-nums'); if(otState.onum) num.push('oldstyle-nums');
          if(otState.frac) num.push('diagonal-fractions'); if(otState.zero) num.push('slashed-zero');
          otSample.style.fontVariantLigatures=lig;
          otSample.style.fontVariantNumeric=num.join(' ')||'normal';
          otSample.style.fontVariantCaps=otState.smcp?'small-caps':'normal';
          var active=Object.keys(otState).filter(function(k){return otState[k];});
          if(otRead) otRead.textContent='active: '+(active.length?active.join(' · '):'none');
          otSample.classList.remove('flash'); void otSample.offsetWidth; otSample.classList.add('flash');
        }
        if(otChips) otChips.addEventListener('click',function(e){
          var b=e.target.closest('.ot-chip'); if(!b) return;
          var f=b.dataset.feat; otState[f]=!otState[f]; b.classList.toggle('on',otState[f]); applyOT();
        });

        /* glyph grid + focus */
        var grid=document.getElementById('glyphGrid');
        if(grid){
          var chars='ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789&@?!*%#'.split(''), g='';
          chars.forEach(function(c){ g+='<button class="cell" data-g="'+c+'">'+c+'</button>'; });
          grid.innerHTML=g;
        }
        var gfocus=document.getElementById('gfocus'), gfWord=document.getElementById('gfWord'),
            gfMeta=document.getElementById('gfMeta'), gfClose=document.getElementById('gfClose');
        function openGlyph(c){
          if(!gfocus) return;
          for(var i=0;i<gfWord.children.length;i++) gfWord.children[i].textContent=c;
          var cp=c.codePointAt(0).toString(16).toUpperCase().padStart(4,'0');
          gfMeta.textContent='U+'+cp+' · glyph '+c;
          gfocus.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false'); gfocus.classList.add('open');
          requestAnimationFrame(function(){ requestAnimationFrame(function(){ gfocus.classList.add('fan'); }); });
        }
        function closeGlyph(){ if(!gfocus) return; gfocus.classList.remove('open','fan'); gfocus.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true'); }
        if(grid) grid.addEventListener('click',function(e){ var c=e.target.closest('.cell'); if(c) openGlyph(c.dataset.g); });
        if(gfClose) gfClose.addEventListener('click',closeGlyph);
        if(gfocus) gfocus.addEventListener('click',function(e){ if(e.target===gfocus) closeGlyph(); });
        document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Escape') closeGlyph(); });

        /* footer chromatic */
        var footMark=document.getElementById('footMark'), footer=document.getElementById('footer');
        if(footMark && footer && !reduce){
          footer.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){
            var r=footer.getBoundingClientRect(); var n=(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width-0.5;
            footMark.style.setProperty('--fs',(n*60).toFixed(1)+'px');
          });
          footer.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){ footMark.style.setProperty('--fs','0px'); });
        }

        /* reveals */
        var io=new IntersectionObserver(function(en){
          en.forEach(function(x){ if(x.isIntersecting){ x.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(x.target); } });
        },{threshold:0.15});
        document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.sep-row').forEach(function(el){ io.observe(el); });

        /* GSAP scenes */
        if(hasGSAP && !reduce){
          gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);
          if(lenis){ lenis.on('scroll',ScrollTrigger.update); gsap.ticker.add(function(t){ lenis.raf(t*1000); }); gsap.ticker.lagSmoothing(0); }

          /* optical size scrub */
          var opszWord=document.getElementById('opszWord'), opszVal=document.getElementById('opszVal'), opszSize=document.getElementById('opszSize');
          if(opszWord){
            gsap.set(opszWord,{fontSize:'5vw'});
            ScrollTrigger.create({
              trigger:'#opsz', start:'top top', end:'+=130%', scrub:0.5, pin:'#opszPin',
              onUpdate:function(self){
                var p=self.progress;
                var op=Math.round(12+p*84); var sz=Math.round(22+p*210);
                opszWord.style.fontSize=(5+p*22)+'vw';
                opszWord.style.fontVariationSettings="'opsz' "+op+",'wght' "+Math.round(700-p*200);
                if(opszVal) opszVal.textContent=op; if(opszSize) opszSize.textContent=sz;
              }
            });
          }

          /* press run */
          var pC=document.getElementById('plateC'),pM=document.getElementById('plateM'),pY=document.getElementById('plateY'),pK=document.getElementById('plateK');
          gsap.set(pC,{x:'-58vw',y:'-12vh',opacity:0,filter:'blur(6px)'});
          gsap.set(pM,{x:'58vw',y:'12vh',opacity:0,filter:'blur(6px)'});
          gsap.set(pY,{x:0,y:'52vh',opacity:0,filter:'blur(6px)'});
          gsap.set(pK,{x:0,y:'-52vh',opacity:0,filter:'blur(6px)'});
          var hudC=document.getElementById('hudC'),hudM=document.getElementById('hudM'),hudY=document.getElementById('hudY'),hudK=document.getElementById('hudK');
          var pressTl=gsap.timeline({scrollTrigger:{trigger:'#press',start:'top top',end:'+=240%',scrub:0.6,pin:'#pressStage',
            onUpdate:function(self){ var p=Math.round(self.progress*100);
              if(hudC) hudC.textContent='cyan '+Math.min(78,p)+'%';
              if(hudM) hudM.textContent='magenta '+Math.min(64,p)+'%';
              if(hudY) hudY.textContent='yellow '+Math.min(52,p)+'%';
              if(hudK) hudK.textContent='key '+Math.min(91,p)+'%'; }}});
          pressTl.to(pC,{x:0,y:0,opacity:1,filter:'blur(0px)',ease:'none'},0)
                 .to(pM,{x:0,y:0,opacity:1,filter:'blur(0px)',ease:'none'},0)
                 .to(pY,{x:0,y:0,opacity:1,filter:'blur(0px)',ease:'none'},0.05)
                 .to(pK,{x:0,y:0,opacity:1,filter:'blur(0px)',ease:'none'},0.1)
                 .to('#pressHud',{opacity:1,ease:'none'},0.1)
                 .to('#pressFrame',{opacity:1,ease:'none'},0.55)
                 .to('#pressLock',{opacity:1,y:0,ease:'none'},0.78);

          /* horizontal gallery */
          var galTrack=document.getElementById('galTrack');
          if(galTrack){
            var dist=function(){ return galTrack.scrollWidth - window.innerWidth + (window.innerWidth*0.06); };
            gsap.to(galTrack,{x:function(){return -dist();},ease:'none',
              scrollTrigger:{trigger:'#gallery',start:'top top',end:function(){return '+='+dist();},scrub:0.6,pin:'#galPin',invalidateOnRefresh:true}});
          }

          /* argument light-up */
          var argText=document.getElementById('argText');
          if(argText){
            var raw=argText.textContent.trim().split(/\s+/);
            argText.innerHTML=raw.map(function(w){return '<span class="word">'+w+'</span>';}).join(' ');
            var spans=argText.querySelectorAll('.word');
            ScrollTrigger.create({trigger:'#argument',start:'top 70%',end:'bottom 75%',scrub:true,
              onUpdate:function(self){ var lit=Math.round(self.progress*spans.length);
                spans.forEach(function(s,i){ s.classList.toggle('lit',i<lit); }); }});
          }

          if(document.fonts && document.fonts.ready) document.fonts.ready.then(function(){ ScrollTrigger.refresh(); });
          window.addEventListener('load',function(){ ScrollTrigger.refresh(); });
        } else {
          ['plateC','plateM','plateY','plateK'].forEach(function(id){ var el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.style.opacity='1'; });
          var pl=document.getElementById('pressLock'); if(pl){ pl.style.opacity='1'; pl.style.transform='translate(-50%,0)'; }
        }
      })();
    </script>

    <script>
      (function(){
        var reduce = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
        if(!reduce && typeof gsap !== 'undefined' && typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
           var sTop = document.querySelector('.split-top');
           var sBot = document.querySelector('.split-bottom');
           var sImg = document.querySelector('.split-center');
           if(sTop && sBot && sImg) {
             gsap.to(sTop, {
               y: '-25vh',
               ease: 'none',
               scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.split-sec', start: 'top top', end: 'bottom bottom', scrub: true }
             });
             gsap.to(sBot, {
               y: '25vh',
               ease: 'none',
               scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.split-sec', start: 'top top', end: 'bottom bottom', scrub: true }
             });
             gsap.to(sImg, {
               scale: 1,
               opacity: 1,
               ease: 'none',
               scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.split-sec', start: 'top top', end: 'bottom bottom', scrub: true }
             });
           }
           var cItems = document.querySelectorAll('.cascade-item');
           if(cItems.length) {
             cItems.forEach(function(item) {
               gsap.to(item, {
                 opacity: 1,
                 y: 0,
                 rotation: 0,
                 ease: 'power2.out',
                 scrollTrigger: {
                   trigger: item,
                   start: 'top 95%',
                   end: 'top 60%',
                   scrub: 1
                 }
               });
             });
           }
        }
      })();
    </script>
  
</body></html>
description: A high-performance landing page template designed for type foundries and creative studios to showcase variable fonts with interactive plate-registration effects.
long_description:
## Interactive Typeface Showcase
This template is a masterclass in modern web typography presentation, specifically built for high-end type foundries and graphic designers. It features deep integration of **variable font axes** and interactive chromatic effects.

- **Interactive Specimen:** Real-time controls for plate spread, ink density, and optical sizing.
- **GSAP Animations:** Scroll-driven plate registration and split-text reveals for a premium tactile feel.
- **OpenType Controls:** Live toggle for ligatures, fractions, and alternate character sets.
- **Responsive Design:** Halftone textures and rosette swatches that adapt across all devices.

## Use Case
Perfect for launching a **new typeface release**, creating a brand guideline showcase, or building a high-impact portfolio for graphic design work.
